criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI features in the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and design quality of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, design awards

criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features and bug fixes.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: How well the app protects user data and privacy.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, user reviews, tech blogs
